aboutDoctor.label: Our Doctor
aboutDoctor.name: Dr. Shahrul Effendi Bin Shuib
aboutDoctor.desc1: Dr. Shahrul Effendi is the founder and principal doctor of Klinik Medi Iman. He is dedicated to delivering high-quality medical care with a warm and compassionate approach.
aboutDoctor.desc2: With qualifications in general medicine and occupational health (OHD), he provides comprehensive services covering individual, family, and organisational health in Semenyih, Selangor.

testimonials.label: Patient Testimonials
testimonials.heading: Trusted by the Semenyih Community
testimonials.sub: Over 5,000 patients have trusted our care

reviews.name: Siti Norbahiyah
reviews.text: Alhamdulillah, I am very satisfied with the service at Klinik Medi Iman. The doctor is very friendly and patient in explaining my condition. The clinic is clean and comfortable. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Ahmad Hafizi
reviews.text: I came for a knee injection and the results were very satisfying. The doctor is very professional and explained the procedure clearly. My knee pain has reduced significantly. Thank you!

reviews.name: Nurul Ain Zulkifli
reviews.text: I went through the mental wellness package here and it was very helpful. The calm clinic atmosphere and understanding doctor made me feel safe. Thank you so much.

reviews.name: Rozita Hamdan
reviews.text: FOMEMA service was fast and easy. Friendly staff, the process didn't take long. Reasonable price and easy to reach location. Will come back!

reviews.name: Mohd Zulkarnain
reviews.text: A very good clinic! The long operating hours suit my work schedule perfectly. No need for long leave just to see a doctor. The doctor is friendly and quickly understands the problem.

reviews.name: Farah Liyana
reviews.text: The weight management programme here is very helpful. The doctor monitors carefully and provides practical dietary advice. Already lost 5kg in 2 months! Many thanks.

partners.label: Partners & Certifications
partners.heading: Trusted & Certified
partners.description: Klinik Medi Iman collaborates with leading industry partners to ensure high-quality healthcare.

partners.desc: Strategic partner for better occupational safety and health in the workplace.

partners.name: MFASB
partners.desc: Collaborating in the provision of FOMEMA services and occupational health examinations.

partners.quote: "Proud to partner for a safer, healthier workplace."

hero.label: About Us
hero.description: Klinik Medi Iman was founded with a clear mission — to provide comprehensive, ethical, and compassionate healthcare to the Semenyih community and surrounding areas.

story.heading: The Story Behind Klinik Medi Iman
story.p1: Klinik Medi Iman was founded on the belief that everyone deserves high-quality medical care — regardless of background or status. We believe that a warm doctor-patient relationship is the foundation of effective treatment.
story.p2: Located at Pusat Perniagaan Kiara, Semenyih, our clinic is easily accessible and offers a wide range of services — from everyday general treatment to specialised occupational health needs.
story.p3: We are proud to be part of the Semenyih community and committed to continuing to provide the best service to you and your family.

doctor.label: Our Doctor
doctor.name: Dr. Shahrul Effendi Bin Shuib
doctor.title: Founder & General Practitioner | OHD (NIOSH)
doctor.p1: Dr. Shahrul Effendi is a dedicated doctor with over a decade of experience in general medicine and occupational health. He holds an MD degree from Indonesia and OHD qualification from NIOSH Malaysia.
doctor.p2: His philosophy is simple: "Patients are not just numbers — they are people with stories, feelings, and unique needs." This approach is what makes Klinik Medi Iman special in the eyes of the community.

items.title: Compassionate Care
items.desc: Every patient is a unique individual. We listen, understand, and treat with full empathy.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality
items.desc: Evidence-based treatment with modern medical equipment and the highest clinical protocol standards.

items.title: Guaranteed Confidentiality
items.desc: Your medical information is completely safe and confidential. Your trust is our priority.

items.title: Holistic Care
items.desc: From individuals, families, to organisations — we are here for all levels of health needs.

symptoms.label: Is This You?
symptoms.heading: Signs You May Need Help
symptoms.description: Mental health is just as important as physical health. If you are experiencing any of the symptoms below, do not hesitate to seek professional help.

package.subtitle: "Where silence finds a voice"

includes.title: Doctor Assessment

includes.title: Emotional Support Session
includes.desc: With an experienced Mental Wellness Consultant

includes.title: Flexible Access
includes.desc: Choose between online or attending the clinic

includes.title: Personal Action Plan
includes.desc: Support plan tailored to your specific needs

includes.title: Follow-up & Support
includes.desc: Follow-up check-ins and additional support sessions available

package.dateLabel: Every Thursday & Friday — By appointment only

freeScreening.heading: Free Screening Available
freeScreening.description: Get a free mental health screening using the PHQ-9 (Depression Screening) and GAD-7 (Anxiety Screening) tools. A quick, confidential process available at our clinic.

hero.label: Knee & Heel
hero.heading: Recover from Knee & Heel Pain
hero.description: Expert treatment for knee, joint, and heel pain — fast, safe, effective.

items.title: Knee Joint Injection
items.desc: Corticosteroid or hyaluronic acid injections to relieve chronic knee pain and osteoarthritis.

items.title: Plantar Fasciitis
items.desc: Treatment for heel pain due to plantar fascia inflammation — combining medication, stretching, and therapy.

items.title: Orthopaedic Assessment
items.desc: Comprehensive examination of the knee and heel joints to determine diagnosis and treatment plan.

items.title: Rehabilitation Programme
items.desc: Stretching guidance, recovery exercises, and lifestyle advice for long-term recovery.

cta.heading: Stop Suffering in Pain
cta.description: Contact us today for a knee & heel treatment appointment.

hero.label: Weight Management
hero.heading: Doctor-Supervised Weight Programme
hero.description: Achieve a healthy weight with a safe, effective, and sustainable medical approach.

items.title: Initial Assessment
items.desc: BMI check, body composition, medical history, and comprehensive health assessment.

items.title: Personal Plan
items.desc: Personalised nutrition and lifestyle plan tailored to your health condition and goals.

items.title: Treatment & Support
items.desc: Medical treatment if required, supplements, and safe exercise guidance.

items.title: Regular Monitoring
items.desc: Regular follow-ups with the doctor to ensure consistent and safe progress.

benefits.heading: Programme Benefits
items: Supervised and monitored by a registered doctor
Safe results without dangerous side effects

hero.label: OSH & FOMEMA
hero.heading: Occupational Health & FOMEMA
hero.description: NIOSH-licensed OHD doctor — protecting worker health and complying with employment law requirements.

services.heading: OSH & FOMEMA Services
services.description: We provide comprehensive occupational health services for companies, factories, and organisations in Semenyih and surrounding areas.

items.title: OHD Doctor Consultation
items.desc: Consultation with a NIOSH-licensed Occupational Health Doctor (OHD) for your organisation's needs.

items.title: Medical Surveillance
items.desc: Regular health monitoring programme for workers exposed to occupational hazards.

items.title: Fitness-to-Work
items.desc: Work capability assessment for new employees, post-illness, or high-risk duties.

items.title: Return-to-Work
items.desc: Assessment and support for workers returning to work after medical leave or injury.

items.title: On-Site Corporate Vaccination
items.desc: Vaccination programme at your company premises — Hepatitis B, Influenza, MMR, and more.

items.title: FOMEMA & Pre-Employment
items.desc: FOMEMA examinations for foreign workers and pre-employment examinations for new employees.

partnership.heading: MIOSH Strategic Partner
partnership.description: Klinik Medi Iman is proud to be a MIOSH strategic partner in ensuring safer and healthier workplaces.
partnership.quote: "Caring Your Health, Protecting Your Workplace. Together, We Care."
